summary: The instruction stack is usable but has portability, scope, or maintenance risks worth fixing before autonomous work.

findings.message: Referenced repository path does not exist at the audited commit: docs/release.md

recommendations: Repair or remove stale repository-path references so agents do not navigate nonexistent files.
Add small client-specific pointer files instead of duplicating the canonical guidance.
limitations: This deterministic audit checks repository structure and text patterns; it does not prove that a model will obey the instructions.
